roundTracker.errorMinPlayers: You need at least 2 players to start a game

roundTracker.errorTricksFirst: Please enter tricks won for all players

scoreTable.bidsRegistered: Bids registered! Play the round and enter tricks

infoModal.title: Skull King Rules
infoModal.description: Scorecard for the Skull King card game
scoringRules: Each round players predict how many tricks they will take
Bid 0 correct: +10 points per card dealt in the round
Bid 0 wrong: -10 points per card dealt in the round
infoModal.bonusTitle: Bonus Points (only if bid is correct):
howToUseSteps: Enter bids at the start of each round
After the round, enter tricks won and bonuses
notes: With 8 players, rounds 8, 9 and 10 have max 8 cards
Bonuses must be entered manually by adding up captured card points

footer.bugOrContribute: Found a bug or want to contribute?
footer.prWelcome: Pull requests and suggestions are welcome!
